name: Thorn Rot Hound
description: A rain-soaked forest hound twisted by thorn rot near the broken road.
notes: Generated first-location enemy for the new Vaelmour visual style.

name: Blackfang Brigand
lootType: Cracked weapons, raider scraps, low gold
description: A masked road brigand who hunts survivors on the outskirts of Vaelmour.
notes: Generated first-location enemy for the new Vaelmour visual style.
